title: Articulate AI Cockpit design philosophy

sources.reason: Repository operating rules defining the required Contract, Summary, scope, and verification workflow.
Authoritative definitions for Mission, Evidence Governance, Repository Governance Layer, implementation records, and Evidence over Self-Declaration.
Existing authoritative philosophy page whose opening must be extended without duplicating later mechanism explanations.

problemStatement: The authoritative AI Cockpit philosophy page explains the existing governance mechanisms but does not yet state the higher-level principles that explain why those mechanisms converge into the current structure or how future mechanisms should be evaluated.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: The authoritative philosophy page presents the four requested design principles and the From Philosophy to Structure mapping.
Repository governance records and generated status remain internally consistent after the documentation change.
Runtime behavior, product capabilities, schemas, and compatibility redirect behavior are unchanged.
scenarioCoverage.reason: This Work Item changes only the authoritative philosophy document and its required governance records.

riskAssessment.reason: Documentation-only change; the primary risks are terminology drift, accidental duplication, and scope expansion.

executionDecision.reason: The task brief, authoritative glossary, target document, scope, acceptance, and verification requirements are explicit.

preReviewWarnings: Review that the new principles explain why the mechanisms exist without redefining Evidence over Self-Declaration, adding capabilities, or changing lifecycle semantics.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: docs/philosophy/design-philosophy.md opens with Discover, Don’t Invent; Follow the North Star; Convergence over Creation; Respect the Nature of the System; and From Philosophy to Structure.

The formal Mission / North Star remains Calibrated Human-Agent Trust, Evidence over Self-Declaration remains intact, and the document distinguishes Mission, Design Principles, Epistemic Principle, Mechanism, Product Boundary, and Implementation.

Intent, Contract, Verification / Evidence, Guards, Summary, Cockpit Status, and Archive are explained as different expressions of one collaboration structure without adding schema fields, product capabilities, or lifecycle phases.
docs/design-philosophy.md, .ai/glossary.md, README files, architecture documentation, schemas, scripts, Makefile, and archived Work Items are unchanged.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: AI Cockpit 的权威设计哲学已经说明现有治理机制是什么，但缺少一组元设计原则来说明这些机制为何会形成 Contract、Intent、Evidence、Summary、Guards 与 Cockpit，以及未来应如何判断新增、合并或移除机制。
constraints: 保持现有 Mission / North Star、Evidence over Self-Declaration、Evidence Governance 和 Repository Governance Layer 的术语层级与含义。
只修改权威哲学页及本 Work Item 的治理记录；不修改兼容入口、Glossary、README、Architecture、Schema、脚本、运行时行为或归档记录。
不新增未经实现支持的能力、Schema 字段或硬性 lifecycle phase，并保持现有日英混合文档风格克制、明确、可用于架构决策。
intent.rationale: 把设计决策的北极星、元设计原则、人与 AI 的责任边界，以及原则到治理结构的映射放在具体机制说明之前，可以让维护者用稳定的协作需要审视框架演化，而不是把流程数量本身当作完整性。

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
